title: SmpStarter Plugin
description: рџ”Ґ SmpStarterxZ вЂ” Ultimate SMP Start System
body:
рџ”Ґ SmpStarterxZ вЂ” Ultimate SMP Start System

SmpStarterxZ is a powerful and lightweight SMP starter plugin designed to manage your serverвЂ™s beginning in a smooth, professional, and exciting way.
It provides countdowns, world border control, grace period protection, bossbars, and animated effects вЂ” all controlled through a single command.

Perfect for SMP servers, events, and competitions.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџљЂ FEATURES
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
вњ” Config-Based License System  
вњ” OP-Only Secure Commands  
вњ” Set WorldBorder Center  
вњ” Instant Border Setup  
вњ” 10 в†’ 1 Start Countdown  
вњ” Totem Pop Animation at Game Start  
вњ” Automatic WorldBorder Expansion (+50 every 2 seconds)  
вњ” 4-Minute Grace Period (PvP Disabled)  
вњ” Grace Period BossBar Countdown  
вњ” Auto PvP Enable After Grace  
вњ” Reset System (Stops Everything)  
вњ” Lightweight & Optimized  
вњ” Supports 1.16.5 в†’ Latest  

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ§ѕ COMMANDS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
/sz set center  в†’ Sets world border center  
/sz start       в†’ Starts the SMP  
/sz reset       в†’ Resets everything  

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ”ђ PERMISSIONS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
All commands are OP ONLY.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
вљ™ CONFIGURATION
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

Discord:- https://discord.gg/DqstpXNntv

messages:
  prefix: "&8[&bSmpStarterxZ&8] "
  no_permission: "&cYou must be OP to use this!"
  game_started: "&aGame Started!"
  grace_ended: "&cGrace period ended!"

settings:
  bossbar_title: "&bInsaanXd Smp Plugin"
  grace_period_seconds: 240
  border_size: 50
  border_expand_every_seconds: 2
  border_expand_amount: 50

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ“Њ HOW IT WORKS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
1) Set center using /sz set center  
2) Run /sz start  
3) Countdown begins  
4) Totem animation at 0  
5) Border expands automatically  
6) Grace period starts  
7) PvP enables after grace  

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
рџ›  RESET SYSTEM
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
/sz reset stops countdown, removes bossbar, stops border expansion, and resets borders.
